26b9563f-1bff-44d2-855e-4da9f19c8b33.title: Almera
26b9563f-1bff-44d2-855e-4da9f19c8b33.text:
Ah, hello there. Nice to see an outsider for a change.
Are you busy? I have a problem.

57749984-3029-4c5a-a8af-33e17d678d64.title: <player>
57749984-3029-4c5a-a8af-33e17d678d64.text: I'm afraid I'm in a rush.

1cc3c040-0a03-46e2-b52e-bcd587ed2fdf.title: Almera
1cc3c040-0a03-46e2-b52e-bcd587ed2fdf.text:
It's my son Hudon, he's always getting into trouble.
The boy's convinced there's hidden treasure in the river
and I'm a bit worried about his safety, the poor lad
can't even swim.

d3707329-b429-4fe4-9748-8f1b867bf0c8.title: <player>
d3707329-b429-4fe4-9748-8f1b867bf0c8.text: I could go and take a look for you if you like?

d6876f8b-00cc-47a9-a8ff-13693d39b215.title: Almera
d6876f8b-00cc-47a9-a8ff-13693d39b215.text:
Would you? You are kind. You can use the small raft
out back if you wish, do be careful, the current down
stream is very strong.

f9ccadaa-646f-4d40-ac46-1a1bddbd8f19.text:
Before starting this quest, be aware that your combat level is lower
than the recommended level of 25.

21f4cabe-757b-4ada-bc4a-014ed75f259b.title: Almera
21f4cabe-757b-4ada-bc4a-014ed75f259b.text: Hello brave adventurer, have you seen my boy yet?

e85b8771-75f9-4e0d-9c1f-f3b8acfb7a7a.title: <player>
e85b8771-75f9-4e0d-9c1f-f3b8acfb7a7a.text: I'm afraid not, but I'm sure he hasn't gone far.

9c16c2fd-5192-433e-a2d0-22d33aa42306.title: Almera
9c16c2fd-5192-433e-a2d0-22d33aa42306.text: I do hope so, you can't be too careful these days.

7813ce26-989c-4a6c-ab52-657604f16c58.title: Almera
7813ce26-989c-4a6c-ab52-657604f16c58.text: Well hello, you're still around then.

21b7c692-20c5-42d8-85f3-e4f885dd2ed8.title: <player>
21b7c692-20c5-42d8-85f3-e4f885dd2ed8.text:
I saw Hudon by the river but he refused to come back
with me.

50128b46-c1bb-42eb-8f26-0ad535485e69.title: Almera
50128b46-c1bb-42eb-8f26-0ad535485e69.text:
Yes he told me, the foolish lad came in drenched to the
bone, he had fallen into the waterfall, lucky he wasn't
killed! Now he can spend the rest of the summer in his
room.

15825c0a-9832-43e7-b569-efe88a418fda.title: <player>
15825c0a-9832-43e7-b569-efe88a418fda.text: Any ideas on what I could do while I'm here?

add6f836-960d-4147-a6a0-bbcd2bf78513.title: Almera
add6f836-960d-4147-a6a0-bbcd2bf78513.text:
Why don't you visit the tourist centre south of the
waterfall?

e4c2b653-068b-480b-bca7-bce0af726c23.title: Note
e4c2b653-068b-480b-bca7-bce0af726c23.text: updates questlog to go to the Tourist Centre

1e59a70a-44fc-4ffe-985b-6ab8bfe2e114.title: Almera
1e59a70a-44fc-4ffe-985b-6ab8bfe2e114.text:
Well hello again brave adventurer, are you enjoying the
tranquil scenery of these parts?

eaea0400-14ad-41dd-ac0a-3210906cd9b9.title: Almera
eaea0400-14ad-41dd-ac0a-3210906cd9b9.text:
Well I'm glad to hear it The authorities wanted to dig
up this whole area for a mine, but the few locals who
lived here wouldn't budge and they gave up.

1a5761e4-bd85-4432-bb3b-78d3112aa8ac.title: Almera
1a5761e4-bd85-4432-bb3b-78d3112aa8ac.text: Hello adventurer, how's your treasure hunt going?

1ea7a19f-a584-4cfd-a7dd-f0a637bc7040.title: Almera
1ea7a19f-a584-4cfd-a7dd-f0a637bc7040.text:
No adventurer stays here this long just to sight see.
But your business is yours alone, if you need to use
the raft go ahead. But please try not crash it this time!
